data.title: UNITE HERE Local 11: Two Women Filed Sex-Based Harassment Complaints with the Civil Rights Department Against the Long Beach Yacht Club
data.description: Two mothers, Julianne Perez and Vanessa Wainer, have lodged complaints with the California Civil Rights Department against Long Beach Yacht Club for alleged sex-based harassment they faced while employed there. The complaints highlight the club's purported failure to address repeated incidents of sex-based harassment, particularly targeting pregnant employees, spanning several years. The aggrieved parties claim that their complaints were not adequately addressed by the private club. The issues at the club are said to have persisted for an extended period, sparking concerns about the workplace environment.

data.title: Zurich shares firsthand insights in 'Data center risks right now'
data.description: In Schaumburg, Illinois on April 30, 2026, a team from Zurich including risk engineers, underwriters, claims leaders, and senior executives delved into 6 important questions regarding data center resilience. Their discussions focused on various factors such as loss drivers, insurance limits, labor concerns, and power requirements. The team aimed to address challenges related to the development of data centers, highlighting key insights to enhance their resilience. The session was conducted to help professionals in the field better understand the risks associated with data centers and how to mitigate them effectively, reflecting the ongoing efforts to improve the industry standards.

data.title: Riot Platforms Reports Q1 Results, Shares Move Higher After Hours
data.description: Riot Platforms Inc, listed on NASDAQ as RIOT, released its Q1 financial results after market close on Thursday. The company reported a revenue of $167.20 million for the first quarter, surpassing analysts' predictions of $130.79 million. However, Riot also disclosed a loss of $1.44 per share for Q1, which was higher than the estimated loss of 44 cents per share as reported by Benzinga Pro. Additionally, Riot Platforms mined a total of 1,473 Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) during the quarter. The stock of RIOT is currently trading within a narrow range. For more details, the complete article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: WEIS MARKETS ANNOUNCES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
data.description: Sunbury, Pennsylvania - As of April 30, 2026, Weis Markets, Inc. (NYSE: WMK) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.34 per share for its shareholders, set to be paid on May 26, 2026. The dividend will be available to shareholders of record as of May 11, 2026. Weis Markets, established in 1912, is a long-standing retail company.

data.title: TomaGold Announces Closing of First Tranche of Private Placement Featuring Strategic Investment from SIDEX and NQIM
data.description: TomaGold Corporation (TSXV: LOT; OTCPK: TOGOF) has successfully closed the first tranche of its non-brokered private placement, raising a total of $853,969.98. This initial tranche involved the issuance of 10,483,333 hard cash units at $0.06 per unit and 2,999,600 flow-through units. The company, based in Montreal, is thrilled to have secured this funding through the Private Placement.

data.title: Atlassian Shares Rally After Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates: Details
data.description: Atlassian Corp (NASDAQ: TEAM) released its third-quarter results, surpassing expectations from analysts. The company reported earnings of $1.75 per share, beating the consensus of $1.32 by 32.58%. Quarterly revenue stood at $1.79 billion, exceeding the estimated $1.69 billion and showing growth from $1.36 billion in the same period last year. Operating income for the quarter was $607.2 million compared to $348.3 million in the third quarter of fiscal year 2026. Watch the price movement of TEAM stock for further developments. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Techcyte Announces $15 Million Capital Raise Led by Van Tuyl Companies to Support Growth and Path to Profitability
data.description: In Orem, Utah, Techcyte, a prominent provider of AI-driven digital diagnostics for pathology, has just accomplished a $15 million capital raise. The funding was spearheaded by Van Tuyl Companies, alongside existing investors Zoetis Inc. and Mayo Clinic. This financial boost bolsters Techcyte's capacity to pursue strategic objectives and moves the company closer to profitability. Notably, Techcyte's veterinary division is already profitable, showcasing the company's potential for growth in the industry.

data.title: FiscalNote to Report First Quarter Financial Results & Host Conference Call on May 7, 2026
data.description: In Washington, FiscalNote will announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 and conduct a conference call on May 7. The call will be a platform for discussing the company's performance in the early part of the year. This event marks an important milestone for FiscalNote as it shares key financial figures and insights with investors and analysts. Attendees will have the opportunity to gain valuable information about the company's progress and future prospects.

data.title: Gen Accelerates Agentic Security and Privacy for the AI Era
data.description: A new addition to the Gen Agent Trust Hub is the inclusion of a VPN for agents, providing enhanced protection for them. Norton 360, a part of the Gen family which also includes Norton, Avast, LifeLock, and MoneyLion, has taken steps to strengthen agent security. This update was shared in Mountain View, California on April 30, 2026, via PRNewswire. Gen, recognized as a global leader and listed on NASDAQ under ticker symbol GEN, is dedicated to enabling Digital Freedom.

data.title: Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. Announces the Filing of Its Annual Report on Form 20-F for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: Montevideo, Uruguay--Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) has disclosed the submission of its 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The document is now available for viewing on the SEC's official website at www.sec.gov or can be accessed through the SEC Filings area of Arcos Dorados' investor relations website.

data.title: LMU Names Cindy Galindo as SVP for University Advancement
data.description: Today, it was disclosed that Cindy Galindo, a prominent philanthropic figure in Southern California, has been appointed as the senior vice president for University Advancement at Loyola Marymount University starting on July 1, 2026. Galindo will be bringing with her a notable track record of leadership in the philanthropic sector.
